fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT entry's posting date.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number on the VAT entry.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type that the VAT entry belongs to.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the VAT entry.

fields.name: Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that the VAT amount (the amount shown in the Amount field) is calculated from.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the VAT entry in LCY.

fields.name: VAT Calculation Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how VAT will be calculated for purchases or sales of items with this particular combination of VAT business posting group and VAT product posting group.

fields.name: Bill-to/Pay-to No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the bill-to customer or pay-to vendor that the entry is linked to.

fields.name: EU 3-Party Trade
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the transaction is related to trade with a third party within the EU.

fields.name: Closed by Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the VAT entry that has closed the entry, if the VAT entry was closed with the Calc. and Post VAT Settlement batch job.

fields.name: Closed
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the VAT entry has been closed by the Calc. and Post VAT Settlement batch job.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Internal Ref. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the internal reference number for the line.

fields.name: Unrealized Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unrealized VAT amount for this line if you use unrealized VAT.

fields.name: Unrealized Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unrealized base amount if you use unrealized VAT.

fields.name: Remaining Unrealized Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains unrealized in the VAT entry.

fields.name: Remaining Unrealized Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of base that remains unrealized in the VAT entry.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved customer or vendor to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved item or resource to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: Additional-Currency Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the VAT entry. The amount is in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Additional-Currency Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that the VAT amount is calculated from if you post in an additional reporting currency.

fields.name: VAT Difference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the difference between the calculated VAT amount and a VAT amount that you have entered manually.

fields.name: Add.-Curr. VAT Difference
fields.tooltip: Specifies, in the additional reporting currency, the VAT difference that arises when you make a correction to a VAT amount on a sales or purchase document.

fields.name: Ship-to/Order Address Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address code of the ship-to customer or order-from vendor that the entry is linked to.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT registration number of the customer or vendor that the entry is linked to.

fields.name: Reversed
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the entry has been part of a reverse transaction.

fields.name: Reversed by Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the correcting entry. If the field Specifies a number, the entry cannot be reversed again.

fields.name: Reversed Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the original entry that was undone by the reverse transaction.

fields.name: EU Service
fields.tooltip: Specifies if this VAT entry is to be reported as a service in the periodic VAT reports.

fields.name: VAT Reporting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT date on the VAT entry. This is either the date that the document was created or posted, depending on your setting on the General Ledger Setup page.

fields.name: Non-Deductible VAT Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of VAT that is not deducted due to the type of goods or services purchased.

fields.name: Non-Deductible VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the transaction for which VAT is not applied, due to the type of goods or services purchased.

fields.name: Non-Deductible VAT Base ACY
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of VAT that is not deducted due to the type of goods or services purchased. The amount is in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Non-Deductible VAT Amount ACY
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the transaction for which VAT is not applied, due to the type of goods or services purchased. The amount is in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Non-Deductible VAT Diff.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the difference between the calculated Non-Deductible VAT amount and a Non-Deductible VAT amount that you have entered manually.
